name: vmap_painting_smoke
description: Smoke test: paint a vmap with a known formula on a 17x17 plane, then verify the resulting weights match the analytical expectation. Catches any regression in formula evaluation, vmap creation, or weight write-back.

args.script:
import c4d
from c4d import utils
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['VMapSmokePlane']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
pg = c4d.BaseObject(c4d.Oplane)
pg[c4d.PRIM_PLANE_WIDTH] = 200
pg[c4d.PRIM_PLANE_HEIGHT] = 200
pg[c4d.PRIM_PLANE_SUBW] = 16
pg[c4d.PRIM_PLANE_SUBH] = 16
doc.InsertObject(pg)
res = utils.SendModelingCommand(c4d.MCOMMAND_MAKEEDITABLE, [pg], doc=doc)
p = res[0]
p.SetName('VMapSmokePlane')
doc.InsertObject(p)
c4d.EventAdd()
print(f'plane points={p.GetPointCount()}')

import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
o = doc.SearchObject('VMapSmokePlane')
if o: o.Remove()
c4d.EventAdd()
print('teardown ok')
